Name: MultiParse V1.1
Description:
* Differences:
** Removed Data Sources
** Added the interfaces IMPGettable, IMPAssignable to accomodate variable assignment
** Default operators behave slightly different
** Fixed bug in explicit typecasts
* Added features:
** Default operator MPAssignment added
** Example library for complex numbers
*** Custom data types: Complex
*** Custom operators: + (unary and binary), - (unary and binary), *, /, ^ (exponentiation), ==, !=
*** Custom functions: Abs() (absolute value), Arg() (argument)
** Example library for arbitrary matrices
*** Custom data types: Matrix, MatrixVariable (matrix variables should start with a capital letter) that allows indexed access, e.g. {"A[1,2]"} sets or gets element at row 2 and columns 3 of matrix A.
*** Custom operators: + (unary and binary), - (unary and binary), *, /, ^ (exponentiation including inverse), ==, !=, (Complex) (explicit type cast)
*** Custom functions: LUD() (lu decomposition), LUSolve() (solve X in A*X=B), Det() (determinant)

Name: MultiParse V1.2
Description:
New updates:
* Added a new structure called CompiledExpression
** Holds all data for evaluation
** Is not dependent on any expression
** Can be used outside of the expression and can be evaluated independently
* Will update documentation
